about me more: 我獨立包辦了從底層模型優化、後端微服務架構，到前端使用者介面的端到端 (End-to-End) 開發：電腦視覺產品與生產線優化： 在 ASUSTek 擔任軟體工程師的 4 年間，我深度參與了企業級 AI 產品的開發，涵蓋影像分割 (Segmentation)、物件偵測 (Object Detection) 與異常檢測 (Anomaly Detection)。我優化了底層的推論流水線與資料庫，成功將這些 AI 技術落地於 20 多家企業客戶的工廠中，大幅提升了精準度並優化了客戶的實體製造流程也透過Ｃ#.net寫了非常多的winform以及WPF的windows版本軟體前端。系統自動化與資料工程： 在 House of Holmes 實習期間，我專注於營運流程的自動化。我利用 Python 針對公司的 Odoo ERP 倉儲管理系統 撰寫了大量的自動化腳本，成功實現了庫存自動補貨與供應商郵件通知的無人化作業。此外，我也串接了 Shopify Webhooks，確保即時的商業數據同步。AI 架構與後端開發： 在 Dell Technologies，我從零架構了基於 MCP 協議的在地化 AI 代理系統 (Agentic Workflow)。我使用 FastAPI 與 Django 建立 RESTful APIs，結合 LangGraph、Ollama 與 ChromaDB 打造具備反思機制的系統，並將 AI 產出的洞察與 Jira 和 Confluence 進行深度對接。雲端原生與系統整合： 我精通 Docker 容器化部署，並具備在 Linux / WSL 環境下掛載 GPU 與 CUDA Runtime 的經驗。在 SunHacks 駭客松，我利用 AWS SQS 結合解耦的 Django 後端與 Gemini-AI，開發了雲原生的即時收據分帳服務 (pic2split)。我不僅僅是撰寫程式碼，我致力於橋接「AI 演算法」與「企業實際營運」，打造出兼具敏捷開發速度與長期代碼可維護性的現代化產品。
summary: Senior Software Engineer with 5 years of experience specializing in scalable Python backend architectures and AI-driven systems. Expert in designing high-performance FastAPI/Asyncio services, integrating complex RAG/LLM workflows, and managing distributed data pipelines. Proven track record in bridging low-level engineering with production-grade, containerized backends while maintaining 99.9% uptime through TDD and CI/CD excellence.

education.degree: Master of Science in Computer Software Engineering
Master of Science in Applied Mathematics (Statistics)

details.title: FastAPI & Agentic Workflow Architecture
details.description: Architected a high-performance backend using FastAPI and Asyncio to orchestrate LangGraph-based Agentic workflows; implemented an MCP orchestrator with AI reflection to route queries via specialized tools, achieving 99.9% classification accuracy.

details.title: Scalable Speech-to-Insight Backend Pipeline
details.description: Engineered a robust ASR service combining Whisper and Breeze-ASR; exposed diarization and summarization features via versioned, high-throughput RESTful endpoints designed for noisy, code-switched enterprise environments.

details.title: Full-Stack Platform & WSL GPU Optimization
details.description: Developed a full-stack AI platform using React for a responsive frontend and Django for a decoupled backend with asynchronous task queues; containerized via Docker and configured WSL GPU to ensure low-latency inference.

details.title: Engineering KPI Analytics & Data Storytelling
details.description: Developed interactive analytics dashboards on Jira/Confluence to visualize failure trends and engineering KPIs, transforming complex datasets into actionable insights to facilitate executive decision-making.

details.title: Optimization Service & Backend Integration
details.description: Implemented a Genetic-Algorithm-based optimization engine exposed as a modular Python backend service, improving task-machine scheduling efficiency by 25% through specialized API endpoints.

details.title: Automated ETL & Data Reliability Pipelines
details.description: Built idempotent Python ETL pipelines with strict schema validation to automate Odoo workflows; ensured high data reliability (99.9%) for downstream enterprise resource planning and predictive models.

details.title: High-Throughput Backend & CV Inference Engineering
details.description: Engineered production-grade inference pipelines for CV segmentation; optimized backend data batching and integrated custom C++ preprocessing DLLs into Python workflows, resulting in 20% faster training and inference cycles.

details.title: Real-time Signal Processing & Patented Backend Systems
details.description: Architected scalable backends for real-time vibration analysis; bridged low-level signal processing with production ML workflows, leading to 3+ patents for industrial-grade abnormality detection systems.

details.title: Enterprise AI Platform & Database Scaling
details.description: Architected a unified monitoring platform deployed to 20+ enterprise clients; optimized PostgreSQL/MongoDB schemas and designed RESTful APIs to handle high-throughput inference logs and real-time system alerts.

details.title: Agile SDLC & CI/CD Leadership
details.description: Spearheaded the full SDLC within a strict Scrum framework; led end-to-end integration of AI models into stable, production environments with 99.9% uptime by enforcing TDD and automated CI/CD pipelines.

details.title: Market Intelligence Web Scraping & Database Design
details.description: Automated e-commerce pricing collection from 30+ websites using Python/SQL, designing a relational database to support data-driven competitive market analysis.

details.title: Predictive Price Modeling & Statistical Analytics
details.description: Developed R-based forecasting models achieving 80%+ validation accuracy, providing actionable insights for dynamic pricing strategies and market positioning.

projects.name: Capstone Project: WeVibe - AI-Powered Matchmaking Platform (Partnership with Appy.ai)
projects.description: Led a cross-functional team as Scrum Master to develop a modern dating app with a focus on innovative matching algorithms. Spearheaded the iOS development using Swift, while architecting a scalable backend with Node.js and PostgreSQL. Managed end-to-end cloud infrastructure on GCP (Google Cloud Platform) to ensure high availability and high-performance real-time messaging services.

projects.name: SunHacks: Cloud-Native AI Receipt Processing Service (live: https://pic2split.design)
projects.description: Engineered a highly scalable OCR service with a React frontend and a Django backend. Architected an event-driven, serverless processing pipeline on AWS by utilizing S3 buckets for image ingestion, SQS for distributed task orchestration, and Lambda functions to trigger Gemini-AI, achieving real-time and decoupled bill itemization.

projects.name: High-Precision Privacy Shield: Low-Level Sensor Integration
projects.description: Engineered a bare-metal AVR system with <10ms response time for real-time privacy protection. Implemented high-precision pulse capture via external interrupts (INT0/1) and multi-modal feedback using PWM/ADC. Architected a telemetry sync layer using Redis and UART to ensure full-stack state consistency between firmware and Django backend.

projects.name: AI-Powered Edge Autonomous Waste Classifier (Sunhack 2025: Honor Award)
projects.description: Developed an Edge AI sorting system on Raspberry Pi integrating a ResNet18 model with real-time actuation. Optimized inference performance via ONNX for resource-constrained deployment and engineered a low-latency GPIO interface for TB6600 stepper motor control. Implemented Socket protocols for AI-to-Hardware synchronization.

projects.name: Intel DevCup: CyberAudio (3rd Place)
projects.description: Developed an end-to-end audio-to-MIDI pipeline using spectrogram modeling optimized with OpenVINO and ONNX to enable high-precision music transcription and low-latency inference on Intel edge devices.

patents.name: Signal Abnormality Detection System and Method (US20230341464A1)
patents.description: Developed an unsupervised anomaly detection framework using Denoising Convolutional Autoencoders (DCAE) and STFT for variable frequency signals. Implemented a robust signal correction algorithm based on inner product alignment to handle cycle deviations in noisy industrial data.

set2.title: Frontend & Tools
items: UART, SPI, I2C, PWM, ADC/DAC, GPIO Control (TB6600/NEMA 17 Stepper Motors), Distributed Systems, Redis (Message Broker), Socket Programming, RESTful APIs, System Design
